welcome.title: Welcome to EvoAI!
welcome.description: Would you like a guided tour to discover the platform's features?
welcome.skipButton: I prefer to explore on my own

step1.title: Welcome to the Dashboard!
step1.content: This is the main panel of the platform. Here you can track the most important metrics of your business in real time.

step2.title: Filters
step2.content: Use filters to segment data by channel, attendant, team, or other criteria.

step3.title: Analysis Period
step3.content: Select the period you want to analyze: today, last 7 days, 30 days, or a custom range.

step4.title: Key Metrics
step4.content: View key indicators: total conversations, messages sent, resolution rate, and average response time.

step5.title: Trends
step5.content: Trend charts show the evolution of metrics over time to help you identify patterns.

step6.title: Performance
step6.content: Track your team's performance with rankings, satisfaction rates, and service distribution.

step1.title: Your Conversations
step1.content: All your team's conversations are here. Select one to start responding.

step2.title: Search Conversations
step2.content: Search conversations by contact name or message content.

step3.title: Conversation Filters
step3.content: Filter conversations by status (open, resolved, pending), assigned attendant, team, or service channel.

step4.title: Conversation List
step4.content: Click any conversation to open it. The blue dot indicates unread messages. Right-click for quick actions.

step5.title: Service Area
step5.content: When you select a conversation, the message history appears here. At the top you'll find contact info and actions like resolve, pause, and transfer.

step1.title: Contact Management
step1.content: Here you manage all contacts in your database. Use search to find a contact quickly.

step2.title: Create Contact
step2.content: Click here to manually add a new contact. You can also import a CSV list or export your database.

step3.title: Advanced Filters
step3.content: Filter your database by attributes such as email, phone, tag, pipeline, or any custom field.

step4.title: View Mode
step4.content: Switch between card (grid) and table view according to your preference.

step5.title: Contact List
step5.content: Click a contact to view details, start a conversation, edit, or delete. Select multiple for bulk actions.

step6.title: Page Navigation
step6.content: Navigate between pages of your contact database and adjust how many records are displayed per page.

step1.title: Agent Management
step1.content: Here you manage all your AI agents. Use search to find an agent quickly.

step2.title: Create Agent
step2.content: Click here to create a new AI agent. The wizard will guide you step by step through the configuration.

step3.title: API Keys
step3.content: Manage API keys to integrate your agents with other systems and platforms.

step4.title: View Mode
step4.content: Switch between card (grid) and table view according to your preference.

step5.title: Agent List
step5.content: See all your agents here. Click edit to configure behaviors, integrations, and the agent's personality.

step1.title: Channel Management
step1.content: Here you manage all connected communication channels. Use search to find a channel quickly.

step2.title: Create Channel
step2.content: Click here to connect a new channel. We support WhatsApp, email, Instagram, and other communication channels.

step3.title: View Mode
step3.content: Switch between card (grid) and table view according to your preference.

step4.title: Channel List
step4.content: See all connected channels here. Click settings to adjust each channel individually or delete channels that are no longer needed.

step5.title: Page Navigation
step5.content: Navigate between pages of your channels and adjust how many records are displayed per page.

step1.title: Pipeline Management
step1.content: Here you organize the service flow of your contacts in stages. Use search to find a pipeline quickly.

step2.title: Create Pipeline
step2.content: Click here to create a new pipeline. Define custom stages to organize your team's service funnel.

step3.title: View Mode
step3.content: Switch between card (grid) and table view according to your preference.

step4.title: Pipeline List
step4.content: See all your pipelines here. Click a pipeline to open the kanban with stages and contacts. You can also edit, duplicate, or delete pipelines via the actions menu.

step1.title: Account Settings
step1.content: Here you manage all your account settings, such as name, language, users, teams, and integrations. Use the side menu to navigate between sections.

step2.title: General Settings
step2.content: Set your account name, default interface language, and other basic preferences. Remember to save after making changes.

step3.title: Auto Resolution
step3.content: Set the time for inactive conversations to be automatically resolved. You can define a closing message and apply a label when finishing.

step4.title: Account ID
step4.content: This is your account's unique identifier. You may need it when contacting support or configuring external integrations.

step1.title: Attendants
step1.content: In this section you manage all attendants on your team.

step2.title: Toolbar
step2.content: Use search to find attendants, create new ones, or send bulk invitations.

step3.title: View Mode
step3.content: Switch between card and table view according to your preference.

step4.title: Attendant List
step4.content: All attendants are displayed here. Click one to edit or remove.

step1.title: Teams
step1.content: Organize your attendants into teams to streamline conversation distribution.

step2.title: Toolbar
step2.content: Create new teams, import/export data, and search existing teams.

step3.title: View Mode
step3.content: Switch between card and table view.

step4.title: Team List
step4.content: See all registered teams. Click 'Manage Members' to add or remove attendants from a team.

step1.title: Labels
step1.content: Create colored labels to categorize and organize your conversations.

step2.title: Toolbar
step2.content: Search existing labels or create a new one by clicking 'New Label'.

step3.title: Label List
step3.content: All labels are displayed here with their name, description, and color. Click the action icons to edit or delete.

step1.title: Custom Attributes
step1.content: Create extra fields to enrich information on conversations, contacts, and pipelines.

step2.title: Toolbar
step2.content: Search attributes or add new ones by clicking 'New Attribute'.

step3.title: Attribute Categories
step3.content: Use tabs to filter between Conversation, Contact, or Pipeline attributes.

step1.title: Canned Responses
step1.content: Create text shortcuts to speed up support with predefined responses.

step2.title: Toolbar
step2.content: Search responses by shortcode or content, or create a new canned response.

step3.title: Canned Response List
step3.content: All registered responses are listed here with their shortcode and content. During a conversation, type '/' to access them quickly.

step1.title: Macros
step1.content: Macros are automated action sequences that can be applied to conversations with a single click.

step2.title: Toolbar
step2.content: Create new macros or search existing ones by name.

step3.title: Macro List
step3.content: All registered macros appear here. Click a macro to edit its actions, or use the run button to apply it.

step1.title: Integrations
step1.content: Connect the system to external tools such as CRM, communication, productivity, and AI.

step2.title: Title and Description
step2.content: Overview of integrations available on the platform.

step3.title: Integration Search
step3.content: Quickly find a specific integration by name or description.

step4.title: Categories
step4.content: Filter integrations by category: CRM, Communication, Productivity, AI, or Custom. Each card lets you configure or toggle the integration.

step1.title: Access Tokens
step1.content: Generate and manage API tokens to securely integrate the system with external applications.

step2.title: Toolbar
step2.content: Create new tokens or search existing ones by name, value, or scope.

step3.title: Token List
step3.content: All tokens appear here with name, scopes, and expiry. Use the actions to view the full value, regenerate, or delete the token.

step1.title: Campaign Management
step1.content: Here you create and track all communication campaigns. Use search to find a campaign quickly.

step2.title: Create Campaign
step2.content: Click here to create a new campaign. The wizard will guide you through the steps of configuring audience, content, and scheduling.

step3.title: Filters
step3.content: Filter your campaigns by status, type, channel, and other criteria to find exactly what you need.

step4.title: Campaign List
step4.content: See all your campaigns here. Track status in real time, start, pause, resume, or delete campaigns as needed.

step5.title: Page Navigation
step5.content: Navigate between pages of your campaigns and adjust how many records are displayed per page.

step1.title: Journey Automations
step1.content: Here you create and manage automated journeys to engage your contacts with intelligent message flows.

step2.title: Create Journey
step2.content: Click here to create a new journey. Set the name, description, and then configure the triggers and actions in the flow editor.

step3.title: Journey List
step3.content: See all your journeys here. Enable or disable each journey via the status toggle, open the flow editor to customize the steps, or duplicate existing journeys to speed up creation.
